opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't stop sneezing, my nose is completely blocked solid, and I feel like I'm suffocating when I try to breathe.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly after dust from renovations and the blockage is making me panic.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 12 hours ago after dusty renovations
symptom_narrative.character: sneezing fits, watery runny nose then total blockage, itchy nose/palate/throat
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: nose blocked solid, feels like suffocating
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: itchy watery eyes, dry cough from drip; no wheeze, no lip/tongue swelling

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; ongoing home renovation dust exposure

objective_data_offered.value: mouth-breathing, hyponasal voice, sneezing on video
no wheeze or throat tightness; breathing through mouth ok
